arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs Everton: TV and live stream info for Ruben Amorim's PL home debut
arts.sum: Sky Sports have not picked Manchester United vs Everton for coverage as part of their Super Sunday offerings, which means UK viewers will be unable to watch the Premier League clash live

arts.ttl: Manuel Ugarte is doing what Dan Ashworth said he would do at Manchester United
arts.sum: Man United are beginning to reap the rewards of their decision to sign Manuel Ugarte in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Everton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man Utd face Everton in the Premier League on Sunday at Old Trafford. Preview includes team news, how to watch and more.

arts.ttl: Manchester United to battle Chelsea, Juventus for Premier League striker in summer transfer window?
arts.sum: Manchester United will reportedly have to battle Chelsea and Juventus for the signature of Ipswich Town's Liam Delap.

arts.ttl: Papers: Juventus line up Man Utd's Zirkzee in January loan move
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'is dating Joey Essex's ex and Love Island star Grace Rosa Jackson'
arts.sum: Jackson, 25, featured on season 11 of the ITV2 dating show and she very briefly coupled up with Joey Essex. This came after she and Essex had enjoyed a holiday romance in 2023.

arts.ttl: Man Utd job will change my life... not me - Amorim
arts.sum: New Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim tells BBC Sport's Mark Chapman how 'destiny' may have led him to Old Trafford and how he is dealing with the pressure of the role.

arts.ttl: I have become a fans favourite at Manchester United but I had no idea they loved me so much
arts.sum: Noussair Mazraoui has quickly endeared himself to Man Utd fans and he is getting as much love from the coaching staff as the terraces.

arts.ttl: Noussair Mazraoui warns Man Utd team-mates about 'tough time' amid Ruben Amorim changes
arts.sum: Noussair Mazraoui has been among the few Manchester United players to have positive starts to the season but believes that Ruben Amorim's early days won't be easy

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund's former team-mate Jesper Lindstrom makes cheeky request to Man United striker before game against Everton on Sunday
arts.sum: Lindstrom messaged the cheeky request to his Danish international team-mate after Hojlund's double for Manchester United against Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League on Thursday.
